notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The address may be wrong or the page was moved.

templatesPage.createFirstOrBrowse: Create your first template or browse the Marketplace.
templatesPage.tryAdjustingSearch: Try adjusting your search or filter.

welcome.title: Welcome to Canvas!
welcome.description: Your personal second brain for capturing ideas, prioritizing tasks, and tracking progress. Let's take a quick tour!
welcome.shortcutHint: Tip: Press ? to see all shortcuts or Ctrl+K for the command palette.

tour.welcomeBody: This is your second brain. Capture ideas, prioritize, and track progress.
tour.warroomBody: Here you see The One Thing, Opportunity Radar, and quick capture.
tour.consultantBody: Chat with the AI Consultant for insights based on your priorities.
tour.opportunitiesBody: Manage tasks and ideas in list, Kanban, or Eisenhower matrix.
tour.journalBody: Log daily reflections and energy level.
tour.ragBody: The Consultant uses semantic search across your data to provide context-aware advice.
tour.automationBody: Create rules to automate repetitive tasks and workflows.
tour.templatesBody: Use ready-made templates or create your own for recurring activities.

checklist.title: Getting Started
checklist.createOpportunityDesc: Add a task, idea, or project to track.
checklist.writeJournalDesc: Reflect on your day with mood and energy.
checklist.visitConsultantDesc: Get AI-powered insights about your priorities.
checklist.tryDeepWorkDesc: Activate focus mode for distraction-free work.

contextualTips.ragDesc: The Consultant searches your opportunities, journal, and goals to give personalized advice.
contextualTips.automationDesc: Create rules like 'When an opportunity is done, add XP' to save time.
contextualTips.templatesDesc: Use templates to create opportunities, journal entries, or goals faster.
contextualTips.deepWorkDesc: Press F or use the sidebar to enter Deep Work mode with a built-in Pomodoro timer.
contextualTips.kanbanDesc: Switch between List, Kanban, and Eisenhower Matrix views for your opportunities.

help.title: Help Center
help.description: FAQ, shortcuts, and how to use the main features.
help.aiUsageDesc: The app uses AI in the Consultant, content generation, analytics insights, chat assistant, and image generation. Calls are processed via Supabase Edge Functions. If you get too many requests (429 error), wait a few minutes before trying again.
help.support: Support: open an issue on the project repository or contact via the project email.
help.faqWarRoomAnswer: It's the main dashboard where you capture ideas, see your daily goal, and access quick shortcuts.
help.faqConsultantAnswer: Type questions or ask for suggestions. The assistant uses your opportunities, journal, and priorities to respond.
help.faqOpportunitiesAnswer: They are captured items (tasks, ideas, projects) that you can move between Backlog, Doing, Review, and Done.
help.faqDeepWorkAnswer: Activate with F or from the menu. Full-screen mode helps you focus; use Pomodoro for 25-min blocks.
help.faqDataAnswer: By default, data is stored in the browser (localStorage). With Supabase configured, it can be synced to the cloud.
help.tourRestarted: Tour restarted! You'll see it on the next page load.
help.demoModeDesc: Load sample data to explore the app without affecting your real data.
help.demoUnloaded: Demo data removed. Your real data is restored.

dashboard.warRoomCustomizeDescription: Drag to reorder. Toggle visibility with the switch.

smartCapture.identifyingDomain: Identifying domain, type, and strategic value...

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeDescription: Toggle between dark and light mode
settings.clearQueueConfirm: Clear entire pending queue? Unsynced items will be discarded.
settings.backupDescription: Export or restore a full backup (JSON) of opportunities, journal, priorities, goals, and more.
settings.backupRestored: Backup restored. Refresh the page if needed.
settings.weeklyGoalsDescription: Define how many tasks to complete and hours of focus per domain each week.
settings.privacyExportNote: You can export your data at any time (data portability).
settings.exportDescription: Exports all opportunities, journal entries, habits, goals, and XP progress as a JSON file.
settings.dataImported: Data imported! Refresh the page to see changes.
settings.clearAllConfirm: This will permanently delete ALL your data. Are you sure?
settings.clearAllDescription: This will permanently delete all your data including opportunities, journal, habits, goals, and XP progress.
settings.aboutDescription: LifeOS is a gamified personal growth platform combining GTD, strategic planning, and gamification. Data is stored locally in your browser. Press
settings.sessionTimeoutDescription: Sign out after this many minutes of inactivity
settings.remindersDescription: Notifications for due dates and opportunity reminders.
settings.emailDigestDescription: Receive a periodic summary of opportunities and journal.
settings.integrationsDescription: API keys and webhooks for external integrations.
settings.noApiKeys: No keys. Create one for programmatic access.
settings.name: Name
settings.targetDescription: The ideal balance percentage for this domain.

opportunities.title: Opportunities
opportunities.noOpportunities: No opportunities yet. Capture something from the dashboard!

consultant.title: Strategic Advisor
consultant.subtitle: AI-powered insights from your second brain
consultant.welcomeAI: Hello! I'm your **Strategic Advisor** powered by AI. I use semantic search across your opportunities, journal entries, and knowledge base to provide personalized, context-aware advice. Ask me anything!
consultant.welcomeLocal: Hello! I'm your **Strategic Advisor**. I analyze your opportunities, focus sessions, habits, goals, and journal to provide data-driven recommendations. Ask me anything about your productivity, priorities, or progress!
consultant.newSessionAI: New session started. I'm your **Strategic Advisor** powered by AI. How can I help you today?
consultant.newSessionLocal: New session started. I'm your **Strategic Advisor**. What would you like to explore?

suggestedQuestions.levelUp: How can I level up faster?

responses.priorityRecommend: Based on strategic value analysis, I recommend focusing on **"{{title}}"** ({{type}}, SV: {{sv}}/10, worth **{{xp}} XP**). You currently have {{doing}} tasks in progress and {{backlog}} in backlog. Consider using Deep Work mode for a focused 25-minute Pomodoro session to maximize your XP gains.
responses.priorityGeneric: You have {{total}} opportunities total. Start by moving a high-value item from backlog to "Doing" and activating Deep Work mode.
responses.energyIntensive: That is quite intensive - consider lighter tasks or a break.
responses.energyCapacity: You still have capacity for focused work.
responses.energyTips:
Energy management tips:

1. Switch to low-SV tasks (networking, small actions)
2. Take a 5-min walk
3. Write a quick journal entry about how you feel
4. Try a shorter 15-min Pomodoro instead of 25
responses.domainWarning: **Warning:** {{domain}} is at {{pct}}% - this exceeds the 40% balance threshold. Consider redistributing effort.
responses.domainCheckRadar: Check the Balance Radar on your dashboard for a visual breakdown.
responses.noGoals: You haven't set any goals yet. I recommend creating 2-3 strategic goals with clear milestones. Go to the Goals page to get started. Focus on outcomes, not activities.
responses.activeGoals: You have **{{count}} active goals**: {{summary}}. Focus on the goal closest to completion to build momentum, or the most strategic one to maximize long-term impact.
responses.noHabits: No habits tracked yet. Start with 1-3 keystone habits like morning exercise, reading, or journaling. Small daily wins compound over time.
responses.habitRemaining: Complete your remaining habits to maintain your streak.
responses.xpCompleted: You've completed **{{count}} opportunities** worth approximately **{{xp}} XP** from tasks alone. Your streak is **{{streak}} days**. Deep work has contributed **{{dwXp}} XP** from Pomodoro sessions. To level up faster, focus on high-SV Study tasks (50 base XP * SV) - they yield the most XP.
responses.studyPending: You have **{{count}} study tasks** pending. Top priority: **"{{title}}"** (SV: {{sv}}/10, worth {{xp}} XP). Study tasks yield the highest XP (50 base * SV). Use Deep Work mode with 25-min Pomodoros for maximum retention.
responses.noStudy: No active study tasks. Create one for your most important learning goal and set a high strategic value (8-10) to reflect its importance.
responses.weekSnapshot:
This week's snapshot:

- **{{done}}** completed
- **{{doing}}** in progress
- **{{backlog}}** in backlog
- Deep work: **{{hours}}h**
- Streak: **{{streak}} days**

Visit the Weekly Review page for a detailed analysis with insights and reflection prompts.
responses.dayPlanTitle: Here's an optimized day plan based on your priorities:
responses.dayPlanEvening:
### Evening
- Journal reflection (+15 XP)
- Review tomorrow's priorities

Use the Time Blocking calendar on your Dashboard to schedule these blocks.
responses.strategyOverview: Strategic overview: You have **{{highSV}} high-impact tasks** (SV >= 8). Study-to-action ratio: **{{study}}:{{action}}**.
responses.strategyGoodStudy: Good study focus! Make sure to convert learning into action.
responses.strategyNeedStudy: Consider adding more study tasks - they yield the highest XP.
responses.strategyHighSV: Focus on completing high-SV tasks first - they give disproportionate returns.
responses.strategyStreakBuilding: building. Aim for 7+ days for the Daily Master achievement.
responses.strategySetGoals: Set 2-3 strategic goals with clear milestones on the Goals page.
responses.defaultIntro: I have access to **{{opportunities}} opportunities**, **{{logs}} journal entries**, **{{habits}} habits**, and **{{goals}} goals**. I can help with:
responses.defaultStudy: **Study strategy**: "Help me optimize my study plan"
responses.defaultXP: **XP & progress**: "How can I level up faster?"
responses.defaultAsk: What would you like to explore?

deepWork.title: Deep Work Mode
deepWork.pressEscOrClick: Press <kbd>Esc</kbd> or click X to exit

weeklyReview.nextWeekPlaceholder: What are your priorities for next week?

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.timeout: The request took too long. Check your connection and try again.
errors.offline: You appear to be offline. Your changes will be saved locally and synced when you reconnect.
errors.boundaryDescription: An error occurred in this section. You can try again or go back to the home page.
errors.networkDescription: We couldn't reach the server. Check your internet connection.
errors.serverDescription: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a few moments.
